requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radiated and Conducted Emissions (SLS / CISPR-aligned)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——辐射及传导发射（SLS / CISPR对齐）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——輻射及傳導發射（SLS / CISPR對齊）

summary.en: Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI) publishes SLS standards aligned with IEC/CISPR for radiated and conducted electromagnetic emissions. Wireless devices must comply with applicable SLS EMC emission limits. EMC test reports from TRCSL-approved or ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories are required as part of the TRCSL type approval dossier. The primary reference standards are SLS adaptations of CISPR 32 (multimedia equipment emissions) and CISPR 22 (IT equipment emissions, legacy), applicable per device category.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡标准机构（SLSI）依据IEC/CISPR发布SLS辐射及传导电磁发射标准。无线设备须符合适用的SLS电磁兼容发射限值。TRCSL型式认可申请文件中须附上TRCSL认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具的电磁兼容测试报告。主要参考标准为CISPR 32（多媒体设备发射，依设备类别适用）和CISPR 22（IT设备发射，旧版）的SLS版本。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡標準機構（SLSI）依據IEC/CISPR發布SLS輻射及傳導電磁發射標準。無線設備須符合適用的SLS電磁相容發射限值。TRCSL型式認可申請文件中須附上TRCSL認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具的電磁相容測試報告。主要參考標準為CISPR 32（多媒體設備發射，依設備類別適用）和CISPR 22（IT設備發射，舊版）的SLS版本。

standards_or_laws: SLS standards (SLSI — CISPR 32 / CISPR 22 aligned, radiated and conducted emissions)
IEC CISPR 32: Multimedia equipment — Electromagnetic disturbances

summary.en: China mandates EMC emission compliance to GB/T 9254.1 (CISPR 32-aligned, multimedia equipment) and GB 9254 (legacy IT equipment), enforced through CCC mandatory certification and SRRC type approval. Both Chinese GB/T standards and SLS standards derive from CISPR but are separately adopted; Chinese test reports are not directly accepted by SLSI.
summary.zh: 中国强制要求符合GB/T 9254.1（与CISPR 32对齐，多媒体设备）和GB 9254（旧版IT设备）电磁兼容发射标准，通过CCC强制认证和SRRC型式核准执行。中国GB/T标准与SLS标准均源自CISPR，但系独立采用；中国测试报告不被SLSI直接接受。
summary.zht: 中國強制要求符合GB/T 9254.1（與CISPR 32對齊，多媒體設備）和GB 9254（舊版IT設備）電磁相容發射標準，通過CCC強制認證和SRRC型式核准執行。中國GB/T標準與SLS標準均源自CISPR，但系獨立採用；中國測試報告不被SLSI直接接受。

gap.en: Moderate gap: both systems derive from CISPR but test reports must be re-issued for SLS compliance. Chinese CCC EMC reports may serve as supporting evidence but are not accepted as a direct substitute. An ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratory must issue fresh SLS-specific reports.
gap.zh: 存在中等差距：两者均源自CISPR，但须重新出具符合SLS标准的测试报告。中国CCC电磁兼容报告可作为支持材料，但不被直接接受替代。须由ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具新的SLS专项报告。
gap.zht: 存在中等差距：兩者均源自CISPR，但須重新出具符合SLS標準的測試報告。中國CCC電磁相容報告可作為支持材料，但不被直接接受替代。須由ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具新的SLS專項報告。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC emission compliance to SLS (SLSI/CISPR-aligned) standards is required as part of TRCSL type approval. CISPR-derived Chinese test data provides a useful technical baseline but new SLS-specific test reports from an ILAC/MRA-accredited lab are required for the Sri Lanka application.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 作为TRCSL型式认可的组成部分，须符合SLS（SLSI/CISPR对齐）电磁兼容发射标准。源自CISPR的中国测试数据可提供有用的技术基础，但须由ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具新的SLS专项测试报告，用于斯里兰卡的申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 作為TRCSL型式認可的組成部分，須符合SLS（SLSI/CISPR對齊）電磁相容發射標準。源自CISPR的中國測試數據可提供有用的技術基礎，但須由ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具新的SLS專項測試報告，用於斯里蘭卡的申請。

requirement_topic.en: RF Exposure — SAR and Maximum Permissible Exposure (TRCSL / ICNIRP-aligned)
requirement_topic.zh: 射频暴露——SAR与最大允许暴露量（TRCSL / ICNIRP对齐）
requirement_topic.zht: 射頻暴露——SAR與最大允許暴露量（TRCSL / ICNIRP對齊）

summary.en: Wireless devices intended for use in close proximity to the human body (handheld phones, tablets, wearables, portable Wi-Fi hotspots) must comply with RF human exposure limits. TRCSL references ICNIRP (International Commission on Non-Ionizing Radiation Protection) guidelines for maximum permissible exposure and SAR (Specific Absorption Rate) limits for consumer devices. SAR test reports from accredited laboratories are required as part of the TRCSL type approval submission. The applicable SAR limit for handheld devices is 2.0 W/kg averaged over 10 g of tissue, consistent with ICNIRP 1998/2020 guidelines.
summary.zh: 用于贴近人体使用的无线设备（手持手机、平板电脑、可穿戴设备、便携式Wi-Fi热点）须符合射频人体暴露限值。TRCSL参照国际非电离辐射防护委员会（ICNIRP）指南，规定消费设备的最大允许暴露量和比吸收率（SAR）限值。认可实验室出具的SAR测试报告须作为TRCSL型式认可申请的组成部分提交。手持设备适用的SAR限值为以10g组织平均2.0 W/kg，与ICNIRP 1998/2020指南一致。
summary.zht: 用於貼近人體使用的無線裝置（手持手機、平板電腦、穿戴裝置、可攜式Wi-Fi熱點）須符合射頻人體暴露限值。TRCSL參照國際非電離輻射防護委員會（ICNIRP）指南，規定消費裝置的最大允許暴露量和比吸收率（SAR）限值。認可實驗室出具的SAR測試報告須作為TRCSL型式認可申請的組成部分提交。手持裝置適用的SAR限值為以10g組織平均2.0 W/kg，與ICNIRP 1998/2020指南一致。

standards_or_laws: ICNIRP Guidelines for Limiting Exposure to Electromagnetic Fields (1998 / 2020 update)
TRCSL Type Approval technical requirements (RF exposure)
IEC 62209-1 / IEC 62209-2: SAR measurement for mobile handsets and devices used near the body

summary.en: China sets SAR limits per GB 21288 (mobile phone SAR limits, 2.0 W/kg per 10 g tissue for head and trunk — ICNIRP-aligned) and GB 8702 (electromagnetic environment control limits). SAR testing is required for MIIT Network Access License (NAL) and SRRC type approval for mobile and portable devices. The Chinese 2.0 W/kg limit and ICNIRP baseline are the same as TRCSL references, but test reports must be re-submitted for TRCSL.
summary.zh: 中国依据GB 21288（手机SAR限值，头部和躯干以10g组织平均2.0 W/kg——与ICNIRP对齐）和GB 8702（电磁环境控制限值）规定SAR限值。手机和便携设备的MIIT网络接入许可证（NAL）和SRRC型式核准均要求进行SAR测试。中国2.0 W/kg限值与ICNIRP基准和TRCSL参考值相同，但测试报告须重新向TRCSL提交。
summary.zht: 中國依據GB 21288（手機SAR限值，頭部和軀幹以10g組織平均2.0 W/kg——與ICNIRP對齊）和GB 8702（電磁環境控制限值）規定SAR限值。手機和可攜裝置的MIIT網路接入許可證（NAL）和SRRC型式核准均要求進行SAR測試。中國2.0 W/kg限值與ICNIRP基準和TRCSL參考值相同，但測試報告須重新向TRCSL提交。

standards_or_laws: GB 21288: SAR limits for mobile handsets
GB 8702: Limits for electromagnetic environment control
SRRC type approval (RF exposure for portable devices)

gap.en: Low technical gap: both China and Sri Lanka reference ICNIRP and use 2.0 W/kg per 10 g as the SAR limit. However, Chinese NAL/SRRC SAR test reports cannot be directly submitted to TRCSL — new test reports referencing TRCSL/ICNIRP requirements from an accredited lab are required for the Sri Lanka type approval application.
gap.zh: 技术差距较小：中国和斯里兰卡均参照ICNIRP，SAR限值均为以10g组织平均2.0 W/kg。但中国NAL/SRRC的SAR测试报告不能直接提交TRCSL——斯里兰卡型式认可申请须另行由认可实验室出具参照TRCSL/ICNIRP要求的新测试报告。
gap.zht: 技術差距較小：中國和斯里蘭卡均參照ICNIRP，SAR限值均為以10g組織平均2.0 W/kg。但中國NAL/SRRC的SAR測試報告不能直接提交TRCSL——斯里蘭卡型式認可申請須另行由認可實驗室出具參照TRCSL/ICNIRP要求的新測試報告。

source.publisher: Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka (TRCSL)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SAR compliance (ICNIRP-aligned, 2.0 W/kg per 10 g) is required for handheld and body-worn wireless devices submitted for TRCSL type approval. The technical limit matches China (GB 21288), but separate TRCSL-referenced SAR test reports from an accredited lab are required — Chinese NAL/SRRC reports cannot be directly substituted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 提交TRCSL型式认可的手持及贴身穿戴无线设备须符合SAR合规要求（ICNIRP对齐，以10g组织平均2.0 W/kg）。技术限值与中国（GB 21288）一致，但须另行由认可实验室出具参照TRCSL要求的SAR测试报告——中国NAL/SRRC报告不能直接替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 提交TRCSL型式認可的手持及貼身穿戴無線裝置須符合SAR合規要求（ICNIRP對齊，以10g組織平均2.0 W/kg）。技術限值與中國（GB 21288）一致，但須另行由認可實驗室出具參照TRCSL要求的SAR測試報告——中國NAL/SRRC報告不能直接替代。
